article_title: Bylaw 14752 — Housing Agreement (4990 Bennett Street) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Locks In Affordable Rental Units at 4990 Bennett Street Through Legal Agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council approved a housing agreement with LM Riviera Homes Ltd. requiring a 6-storey rental building at 4990 Bennett Street to provide non-market (below-market-rate) rental units as affordable housing, with conditions registered on the property title.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Tenant
